question: Will Germany recognize Palestine within 2 years of Ireland, Norway and Spain?
textDescription:
Today, May 28, 2024, Ireland, Norway, and Spain officially recognized the State of Palestine.

Will Germany do the same within two years?

Resolution Criteria

	1.	Definition: Official recognition involves the German government's formal declaration or diplomatic note acknowledging Palestine as a sovereign state.

	2.	Source: Confirmation through credible sources such as official German government statements, major news outlets, or international diplomatic records.

	3.	Timing: Recognition must occur before May 29, 2026, German time.

(https://manifold.markets/embed/GazDownright/will-germany-recognize-the-state-of)
newsShortReason: Germany's consistent statements against recognizing Palestine and emphasis on a negotiated two-state solution.
newsKeyEvidence: Chancellor Scholz stated there is 'no reason' to recognize Palestine as a separate state, citing lack of clarity on territorial issues. ([aa.com.tr](https://www.aa.com.tr/en/europe/german-chancellor-sees-no-reason-to-recognize-palestinian-state/3229530?utm_source=openai)) | Foreign Minister Baerbock emphasized the necessity of a 'political solution' before considering recognition. ([english.almayadeen.net](https://english.almayadeen.net/news/politics/germany--not-planning--palestine-recognition?utm_source=openai)) | The German Foreign Ministry reiterated that conditions are not yet conducive for recognizing an independent Palestinian state. ([aa.com.tr](https://aa.com.tr/en/europe/germany-says-conditions-not-yet-conducive-for-recognizing-independent-palestinian-state/3227347?utm_source=openai))
